---
name: Add Contributor
about: Add yourself to the ATR contributor wall
title: "Add contributor: YOUR_GITHUB_USERNAME"
labels: contributor
---

**I'd like to be added to the ATR contributor wall.**

<!-- Edit the YAML below with your information, then submit this issue. A maintainer will add you, or you can submit a PR directly to contributors.yaml -->

```yaml
- github: YOUR_GITHUB_USERNAME
  country: XX          # ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 (e.g. US, TW, DE, JP, IN, GB, FR, KR, BR)
  role: contributor    # maintainer | contributor | reporter
  contributions:       # pick all that apply:
    - rules            # wrote or reviewed detection rules
    - evasion-report   # reported an ATR bypass
    - fp-report        # reported a false positive
    - review           # reviewed PRs
    - docs             # documentation contributions
    - engine           # core engine work
    - website          # website contributions
    - benchmark        # benchmark data or testing
```

<!-- Why join? Your avatar + country flag appears on agentthreatrule.org. More contributions = bigger flag. -->
